intro: 100% free courses where you can earn a certificate without paying. We flag which ones give a downloadable certificate vs. a digital badge vs. honor-system completion. All links open the official course platform.

platforms.title: 🏆 Platforms with Truly Free Certificates
platforms.subtitle: These platforms issue a free, downloadable certificate the moment you finish the course — no hidden fees.

courses.name: IBM Cognitive Class
courses.description: Free badges from IBM in Data Science, Python, Big Data, Deep Learning, AI Ethics.

courses.name: Great Learning Academy
courses.description: Hundreds of free courses in ML, AI, Data Science, GenAI — each with a free certificate.

courses.name: Simplilearn SkillUp
courses.description: Free courses on Data Science, AI, ML, Generative AI with shareable certificates.

courses.name: HP LIFE
courses.description: Free business + tech courses from HP Foundation, including AI for Business.

courses.name: Microsoft Learn
courses.description: Free learning paths for Azure AI, Copilot, ML on Azure, Power BI — earn free badges.

courses.name: Saylor Academy
courses.description: Free college-level courses. Free certificates after a proctored final exam.

courses.name: Alison
courses.description: Thousands of free courses. Digital certificate is free to view; paper costs extra.

courses.name: AWS Skill Builder
courses.description: Free AWS learning paths including Generative AI Essentials and AI Practitioner prep.

platforms.title: 🎓 World-Class Courses (Audit Free)
platforms.subtitle: Top universities and AI labs. Course content is free to audit; paid certificate is optional. Often you can apply for full financial aid → free certificate.

courses.name: Coursera (Audit Mode)
courses.description: Audit thousands of ML / AI / DS courses for free. Apply for financial aid for a free verified certificate.
courses.cert: Free audit · Cert via financial aid

courses.name: DeepLearning.AI Short Courses
courses.description: Andrew Ng's free 1-hour courses on GenAI, RAG, agents, LangChain — completion certificates included.

courses.name: Google AI Essentials
courses.description: Google's free intro to AI for everyone. Audit free on Coursera.

courses.name: Google Digital Garage
courses.description: Free certificate courses on data, marketing, career skills.

courses.name: Stanford Online CS229 (ML)
courses.description: The legendary Stanford ML lecture series. Free notes + videos.

courses.name: MIT OpenCourseWare
courses.description: Free MIT lecture notes, problem sets, exams — including 6.034 AI and 6.036 ML.

courses.name: edX Audit
courses.description: Audit MIT, Harvard, Berkeley AI/ML courses for free. Cert is paid.

courses.name: Harvard CS50 AI (edX)
courses.description: Harvard's free AI with Python course. Free certificate via CS50 site.

platforms.title: ⚡ Practical Hands-On Courses
platforms.subtitle: Build-something-real courses with strong free tracks, perfect for AI/ML/DS/GenAI portfolio projects.

courses.name: Kaggle Learn
courses.description: Free bite-sized micro-courses on Python, Pandas, ML, Deep Learning, Computer Vision — each with a certificate.

courses.name: Hugging Face Learn
courses.description: Free courses on NLP, LLMs, Audio, Diffusion, Reinforcement Learning, AI Agents — community certificates.

courses.name: fast.ai
courses.description: Practical Deep Learning for Coders. Top-tier free course by Jeremy Howard.

courses.name: freeCodeCamp
courses.description: Free certifications in Machine Learning with Python and Data Analysis with Python.

courses.name: Microsoft AI Skills Navigator
courses.description: Curated free Microsoft Learn paths on Generative AI + Copilot — free badges.

courses.name: Google Cloud Skills Boost
courses.description: Free intro courses on Generative AI on Google Cloud. Earn free skill badges.

courses.name: NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI)
courses.description: Several free DLI courses with completion certificates (look for $0 ones).

courses.name: Intel AI for Future Workforce
courses.description: Free Intel AI Academy courses on ML basics.

platforms.title: 🎥 Free Courses on Udemy & Beyond
platforms.subtitle: Udemy's free courses (the ones with $0 price) don't issue certificates by default, but they're excellent learning material. Look for these high-quality free options.

courses.name: Udemy — Free Courses (Filter $0)
courses.description: Full Udemy free catalog. Search 'Machine Learning', 'Python', 'AI' — no cert for free courses.

courses.name: Real Discount (Udemy Coupons)
courses.description: Time-limited 100%-off coupons for paid Udemy courses — completion certificate included once enrolled free.

courses.name: Discudemy
courses.description: Daily list of Udemy courses temporarily free with coupon — same certificate as paid.

courses.name: Coursera For Free / Class Central
courses.description: Curated index of every free ML/AI course across all platforms.

courses.name: Codecademy (Free Tier)
courses.description: Free interactive lessons in Python, SQL, ML. Certificate requires Pro.

courses.name: DataCamp (Free Day Tracks)
courses.description: Free intro tracks for Python, SQL, Power BI, AI.

courses.name: Khan Academy
courses.description: Free foundational courses in statistics, linear algebra, calculus — essential for ML.

courses.name: MIT 6.S191 — Intro to Deep Learning
courses.description: MIT's free annual deep learning bootcamp. Lectures, labs, projects.

platforms.title: 🚀 Specialized: Gen AI, LLMs & Agents
platforms.subtitle: Free, current courses on the latest GenAI, LLMs, RAG, agents.

courses.name: DeepLearning.AI — LangChain for LLM Apps
courses.description: Free short course by Andrew Ng + Harrison Chase. Free completion cert.

courses.name: DeepLearning.AI — Building & Evaluating RAG
courses.description: Free RAG pipelines course.

courses.name: Hugging Face — AI Agents Course
courses.description: Free comprehensive course on building AI agents.

courses.name: Hugging Face — LLM Course
courses.description: Free transformers + LLM fine-tuning course.

courses.name: Anthropic — Prompt Engineering Tutorial
courses.description: Free official Claude prompt engineering interactive tutorial.

courses.name: OpenAI Academy
courses.description: Free OpenAI Academy courses on prompt engineering + ChatGPT for work.

courses.name: Activeloop — GenAI 360
courses.description: Free LangChain, LlamaIndex, RAG, fine-tuning courses with certificates.

courses.name: Google — Generative AI Learning Path
courses.description: Free 7-course intro to Generative AI on Google Cloud — earn skill badges.
